name: Peanut Butter & Jelly Cheesecake
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine oats, peanuts, brown sugar and butter; press mixture onto the bottom of a 9-inch springform pan.
2. Bake at 325°F for 10 minutes.
3. Increase oven temperature to 450°F.
4. In a large bowl, combine softened cream cheese, sugar, peanut butter and flour. Mix until well blended (batter will be very stiff). Add eggs one at a time, mixing well after each addition. Blend in milk.
5. Pour the mixture over the crust.
6. Bake at 450°F for 10 minutes. Reduce oven temperature to 250°F.
7. Continue baking for 40 minutes. Loosen cake from the rim of the pan and cool before removing the rim.
8. Heat jelly until melted; spoon over cheesecake. Chill.
